description: Skilled in metalworking, forging, and weapon/armor repair
materialRequirements: Stone foundation, wood walls, forge equipment

productions.description: Produces bronze (requires Miner with copper + tin)

interdependenceDescription: Adds level to Miner for tin; requires Miner for ore; Carpenter improves tools
randomTalk: The secret to good metalwork is hitting it until it's the right shape. Same applies to most problems, really.
I don't make mistakes. I make unexpectedly artistic letter openers.
Iron bends to my will. Copper bends to anyone's will. Copper has no self-respect.
They say a bad workman blames his tools. A GOOD workman blames the ore quality, which is the Miner's fault.
Do you know how many things I could be making right now instead of talking to you? At least three.
randomGreets: Need something forged? You've come to the right anvil.
Step in, but don't touch anything glowing. Or anything near something glowing.
What'll it be? Sharp, blunt, or decoratively pointy?
Another customer! I mean, uh, valued member of the village.
Come in, come in. The forge is warm and the company is hot. Or was it the other way round?
randomGoodbye: Off you go. I've got metal to abuse.
Right, back to the anvil. It misses me when I'm away.
Don't forget - if it breaks, you bought it somewhere else.
May your armor never be tested. But if it is, you're welcome.
